things.name: Ria Formosa Natural Park
things.description: Stunning lagoon system of islands, salt marshes and beaches, a paradise for birdwatchers

things.name: Old Town (Cidade Velha)
things.description: Walled medieval city with Roman, Moorish and Portuguese history around the Cathedral

things.name: Faro Cathedral (Se)
things.description: Cathedral with a climbable tower and panoramic views across the lagoon

things.name: Igreja do Carmo
things.description: Baroque church with a famous Chapel of Bones lined with 1,245 monks' skulls

things.name: Ilha Deserta
things.description: Pristine uninhabited barrier island accessible by ferry with empty beaches

things.name: Museu Municipal
things.description: Archaeological and ethnographic museum in a former convent with Roman mosaics

things.name: Loulé Market
things.description: Arab-style covered market in the Moorish-domed building with fresh Algarve produce

things.name: Tavira
things.description: Elegant riverine town with Roman bridge, castle and some of the finest beaches in the Algarve

things.name: Olhao
things.description: Whitewashed cubist fishing village with the finest covered market in the Algarve

things.name: Estoi Palace
things.description: 18th-century Rococo palace with tiered gardens, fountains and Roman ruins of Milreu
